mission.title: fluentd: td-agent v3.2.1 does not close log files on rotation
mission.description: td-agent v3.2.1 does not close log files on rotation. This issue affects 6+ users.

steps.title: Identify fluentd troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your fluentd deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd -n fluentd --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review fluentd configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant fluentd configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd
kubectl get configmap -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=fluentd
```
Check [CONTRIBUTING guideline](https://github.com/fluent/fluentd/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) first and here is the list to help us investigate the problem.

steps.title: Apply the fix for td-agent v3.2.1 does not close log files on rotation
steps.description:
* Enable to set interval of restarting workers
  See #3749 and #3768
* Fix a bug that fluentd doesn't release its own log file even after
  rotated by external tools
  Fix #2200 and #2426
Fix a bug that fluentd doesn't release its own log file even after rotated by external tools
```yaml
/var/log/td-agent/td-agent.log {
  daily
  rotate 30
  compress
  delaycompress
  notifempty
  create 640 td-agent td-agent
  sharedscripts
  postrotate
    pid=/var/run/td-agent/td-agent.pid
    if [ -s "$pid" ]
    then
      kill -USR1 "$(cat $pid)"
    fi
  endscript
}
```

steps.title: Confirm td-agent v3.2.1 does not close log files on… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd -n fluentd --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n fluentd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
* Enable to set interval of restarting workers
  See #3749 and #3768
* Fix a bug that fluentd doesn't release its own log file even after
  rotated by external tools
  Fix #2200 and #2426
Fix a bug that fluentd doesn't release its own log file even after rotated by external tools
codeSnippets:
/var/log/td-agent/td-agent.log {
  daily
  rotate 30
  compress
  delaycompress
  notifempty
  create 640 td-agent td-agent
  sharedscripts
  postrotate
    pid=/var/run/td-agent/td-agent.pid
    if [ -s "$pid" ]
    then
      kill -USR1 "$(cat $pid)"
    fi
  endscript
}

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with fluentd installed or the issue environment reproducible.
